TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Tfuya ga niya mki sku Kagi Keng atu Arisan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 122 buwan, 389 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 374 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 15 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Cou 90%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tfuya hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Tfuya hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Tfuya hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tfuya hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Tfuya hya' ga Pnguu. tay mkyahu' na Tfuya hya' ga Tapang Č. tay 'zil na Tfuya hya' ga Lalauya. giway rgrgyax qu qalang. kahul sa rgrgyax tmnga' mita' ga, wiway yulung qu rgrgyax. blaq balay ngayan. rekisi kayal qmisan lga, hzyaq balay maki' te rgyax hiya'. kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu "Taywan hawsing" qu spzyang glgang nha qalang musa' ana inu'. kisya' glgan ungat kisya' nya'. spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč t*uja …£a nija mki s~…ēku ka…£i keŇč atu aris~…ēan …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, ¶~ ®ou **%, ő≤unun *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na t*uja ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj Ēzil na t*uja ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na t*uja ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na t*uja ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na t*uja ńßja Ē …£a pŇčuu. taj mkjańßu Ē na t*uja ńßja Ē …£a tapaŇč*. taj Ēzil na t*uja ńßja Ē …£a lalauja. …£iwaj r…£r…£jax qu qalaŇč. kańßul s~…ēa r…£r…£jax tmŇča Ē mita Ē …£a, wiwaj juluŇč qu r…£r…£jax. ő≤laq ő≤alaj Ňčajan. rekis~…ēi kajal qmis~…ēan l…£a, ńßzjaq ő≤alaj maki Ē te r…£jax ńßija Ē. kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu "tajwan ńßaws~…ēiŇč" qu s~…ēpzjaŇč …£l…£aŇč nńßa qalaŇč mus~…ēa Ē ana inu Ē. kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an uŇčat kis~…ēja Ē nja Ē. s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Tfuya ga niya mki sku Kagi Keng atu Arisan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 122 buwan, 389 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 374 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 15 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Cou 90%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tfuya hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Tfuya hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Tfuya hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tfuya hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Tfuya hya' ga Pnguu. tay mkyahu' na Tfuya hya' ga Tapang Č. tay 'zil na Tfuya hya' ga Lalauya. giway rgrgyax qu qalang. kahul sa rgrgyax tmnga' mita' ga, wiway yulung qu rgrgyax. blaq balay ngayan. rekisi kayal qmisan lga, hzyaq balay maki' te rgyax hiya'. kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu "Taywan hawsing" qu spzyang glgang nha qalang musa' ana inu'. kisya' glgan ungat kisya' nya'. spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
